creator: bourne.identity@hotmail.com
text:
Created attachment 185216
Contains the shar for the new port dircmp

dircmp is a Bourne script that can compare 2 directories recursively under open-source environments (FreeBSD/Linux/Cygwin). Run without an optional arguments, it produces a gist of all differences between LHS and RHS. You can also use dircmp to automatically copy/delete missing data.
